dependency_rules.note: sandbox access checklist cannot start until pricing FAQ is finalized. Extend applies from the most recently stated deadline (2026-06-10 per transcript_part2.txt), not from original or previous deadline.
partner onboarding session requires sandbox checklist completion

resource_conflicts.note: If owner has multiple deadlines in the conflict window and all affected actions remain open, later deadline takes precedence for resource planning. Earlier task retains its original deadline unless explicitly rescheduled.
